_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Manage system/server resources including performance, capacity, availability, serviceability, and recoverability.
reference_document_element_description: Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications, including environment configuration, dependency specification, secrets management, and environment parity maintenance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-015 (AI, cosine: 0.530), TF-T-007 (TF, cosine: 0.525).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.481). Shared vocabulary: [manage]. DCWF-only terms [availability, capacity, performance, recoverability, resources, server] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, configuration, data, dependency, development, environment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.886, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.2%). "Manage system/server resources including performance, capacity, availability, se" and "Manage development, staging, and production environments for data applications," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.542 > STS 0.481 (gap +0.061). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [manage] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [manage]. DCWF-only: [availability, capacity, performance, recoverability, resources, server]. WIDAI-only: [applications, configuration, data, dependency, development, environment].
